game_info.title: Red Dungeon Escape
game_info.concept:
The wall in front of me starts to shake and hurtles towards me….I’m dead!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/redungeon/id1119569595

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

The wall in front of me starts to shake and hurtles towards me….I’m dead!
Spike holes are underfoot it’s already too late …I’m dead! 
I take my last breath as the slime creature engulfs me….I’m dead!

Like always I’m brought back to try again….is someone helping me or do they just really want me to hurt?

Enter the world of Redungeon!


Features:
• Endless, random, increasingly difficult dungeons.
• Dozens of complex traps carefully designed to stop you.
• Unlockable characters, each with unique game-changing skills!
• Great music by Dave Cowen, the composer behind Leap Day and Rust Bucket. 
• Lots of angry, colourful pixels (and a few friendly ones).
• Swipe controls or on-screen buttons.


Important information:
This game contains third party advertising and cross promotion for other Nitrome games, both which can be removed via a one time In-App Purchase.
game_info.description: "Red Dungeon Escape" is an endless procedural dungeon crawler where you must outrun a crushing wall of doom chasing you from the left. Navigate a treacherous grid filled with spike traps, patrolling slimes, spinning blades, and crumbling floors. Collect gold coins for score while moving swiftly to the right to survive. Every step matters in this fast-paced test of reflexes and planning.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move character (Grid-based movement)
- Space: Wait/Hold position
- ESC: Pause / Unpause
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart (after Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and basic survival mechanics by attempting to move right consistently.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot will scan grid cells to the right, up, and down. It will prioritize moving right (away from the doom wall) into safe cells (no walls, no active traps), falling back to up/down if blocked.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should travel a significant distance (score > 50) without dying immediately to the wall or static hazards.

TEST_2.test_description: Stress test the physics and input systems with random inputs.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot will generate random movement commands (Up, Down, Left, Right, Wait) at a high frequency.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should handle the erratic input without crashing, and eventually the player will die to a hazard or the wall, triggering the correct Game Over state.

TEST_3.test_description: Test collision detection with dynamic hazards (Spikes).
TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot will intentionally wait near spikes and attempt to move through them when safe, or get hit to verify damage logic.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player death should register accurately when colliding with an active spike trap.
